title: Hackathon 2026
description: 24-hour intra-college hackathon focused on IoT and AI solutions. Teams of 2–4 students from CSE and IoT branches.
location: Innovation Lab, Cambridge Institute of Technology

title: Placement Drive
description: On-campus recruitment drive for 6th semester CSE and IoT students. Eligible candidates with CGPA ≥ 7.0 and no active backlogs.
location: Seminar Hall, Cambridge Institute of Technology

title: AI Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop covering ML pipelines, neural networks, and deploying AI models on edge IoT devices.
